user_prompt: Can you read attachments that customers send via Intercom?
actual_output:
Hi there! 

Through my integration with Intercom, I can process and read text-based attachments and the metadata associated with the files customers send. This helps me quickly gather context to triage the ticket or draft a helpful response.

However, for certain complex files, images, or documents containing highly sensitive information, I may not be able to fully analyze the contents. In those cases, I will automatically flag the ticket and escalate it to one of our human support specialists to ensure the customer gets the accurate help they need. 

Is there a specific type of attachment or workflow you are looking to set up? I'd be happy to help you figure out the best way to handle it!
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly answered the user's question about its technical capabilities regarding Intercom attachments while maintaining its persona.
